prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GUNROPE-GC-RP44CAL Product Type: GUN_CLEANING_KIT Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: Compact Portable Bore Cord Pistol Gun Cleaning Rope Tool .44CAL Description: The ASR Outdoor Compact Portable Cord Pistol Gun Cleaning Rope Tool uses a three-pass cleaning system to clean out debris from the barrel of your gun, ensuring the continued safe firing and functionality of your gun(s). Employing a leader rope, followed by a cleaning rope and bronze bristle, the cord cleaning rope tool is a fast and efficient way to clean your gun when you're in the field or at the range away from your regular cleaning supplies and resources.

Caliber compatibility listed below:

44CAL Pistol Rope Cleaner compatible with 44,.45,.70, .416,.458 and .460 caliber pistols

Folding up to fit in the palm of your hand, the gun rope cleaner will easily fit in any backpack, gun range bag, or other; use the leader rope at the beginning of the tool to wrap around the cleaning rope and secure; this is a great tool to include with your camping, hunting or general outdoor equipment or survival gear as well as it can come in hand for other tasks. Lastly, the nylon cleaning rope absorbs well, is machine or hand washable and reusable hundreds of times over to help maintain a consistently clean gun barrel or gun chamber; safe to use with fun cleaning solvents, solutions, or oils.

NOTE: ALWAYS remove the magazine and clear the chamber before cleaning; No assembly/disassembly is required Search Terms: gun cleaning tools kits ropes oil patches mat flare bb rifle pistol backpacking travel camping accessories hunting Features: - QUICK AND EASY GUN CLEANING TOOL: The ASR Outdoor Compact Portable Bore Cord Pistol Gun Cleaning Rope Tool uses a three-pass cleaning system to clean out debris from the barrel of your gun, ensuring the continued safe firing and functionality of your gun(s); optimal when used with gun cleaning solutions, solvents or oils; no assembly required - COMPACT AND TRAVEL FRIENDLY: Folding up to fit in the palm of your hand, the gun rope cleaner will easily fit in any backpack, gun range bag or other; use the leader rope at the beginning of the tool to wrap around the cleaning rope and secure; this is a great tool to include with your camping, hunting or general outdoor equipment or survival gear as well - REUSEABLE AND WASHABLE: The nylon bore cleaning rope absorbs well, is machine or hand washable and reusable hundreds of times over to help maintain a consistently clean gun barrel or gun chamber; safe to use with fun cleaning solvents - AVAILABLE STYLES: .22CAL Pistol Rope Cleaning compatible with.22 and 5.56MM caliber pistols; .44CAL Pistol Rope Cleaner compatible with 44,.45,.70, .416,.458 and .460 caliber pistols; 9MM CAL Pistol Rope Cleaner compatible with .357, .380,.38 and 9MM caliber pistols; .308CAL Pistol Rope Cleaner compatible with .308,.30-35,30-06, .300,.303 and 7.62MM caliber pistols - SPECIFICATIONS: Open Length Dimensions: 58 inches; Folded Length Dimensions: 4 inches; Color: Multi; Material: Nylon/Polyester === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor .44CAL Compact Portable Bore Cleaning Rope

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor .44 Cal Pistol Bore Cleaning Rope Tool

anthropic.title_differentiation: Three-Pass Cleaning System, Reusable And Washable, Travel Compact, Compatible With Multiple Calibers, No Assembly Required

openai.title_differentiation: Three Pass Cleaning System, Portable Palm Size, Washable Reusable Nylon Rope, Safe With Solvents, No Assembly Required
